parameters.query: SELECT id, content, platform FROM post_queue WHERE status='scheduled' AND scheduled_for <= NOW() ORDER BY scheduled_for ASC LIMIT 5;
UPDATE post_queue SET status = CASE WHEN {{ $json.ok }} THEN 'published' ELSE 'failed' END, updated_at=NOW() WHERE id = {{ $json.postId }};

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ chat_id: 2106351328, text: ($('Publish To X').item.json.ok ? '\u2705 Opublikowano zaplanowany post:\n' + $('Publish To X').item.json.tweet_url : '\u26a0\ufe0f Nie udalo sie opublikowac zaplanowanego posta (status ' + $('Publish To X').item.json.x_status + ')') }) }}
